friendReq.title: Friend requests
friendReq.emptyIncomingSub: When someone asks to be your friend, you'll see it here.
friendReq.emptySentSub: Pending friend requests you sent will show up here.

blocked.title: Blocked users
blocked.unblockBody: {{name}} will be able to see your content and contact you again.
blocked.emptySub: Blocked users won't see your content, and you won't see theirs.
